title: Controller Manager
description: Create a ControllerGuy class (similar to KeyGuy) that handles gamepad/controller input. Detect which input device is active and switch context. Support standard gamepad layout (Xbox/PlayStation style) with d-pad for layer navigation, sticks for camera, and face buttons for actions.
definition-of-done: ControllerGuy class created. Controller input detected and handled. Auto-detection of keyboard vs controller. UI hints change based on active input device.
testing-plan: Test with Xbox controller. Verify all mapped actions work. Test switching between keyboard and controller. Verify UI hints update.
todos: Add GLFW gamepad polling or similar
Map controller buttons to existing KeyActions
Create InputManager to detect active device
Add controller icons/hints to UI when controller active
unknowns: Which controller library to use (GLFW gamepad API or external)
How to handle controller deadzone and sensitivity
